Skill Path: Psyche

Through much training you gained a few psychic abilities.

While developing your skills in Occultism you chose to focus specifically on Psyche, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.p5Bmj3d0uAGnrzIn]{Read Psychometric Resonance}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.nJ3EBRat9yUgeWwv]{Automatic Writing}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge}.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.p5Bmj3d0uAGnrzIn]{Read Psychometric Resonance}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.nJ3EBRat9yUgeWwv]{Automatic Writing}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.zdjPTg6vRwg8r2Lm]{Aura Sight}
  • Master: choose one of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.fvYwsHM9O1twQa5N]{Consult the Spirits}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.hkSuxXOc9qBleJbd]{Disturbing Knowledge}
